subject: [PATCH 02/19] nfsd: clear opcnt on compound arg release to prevent OOB read

2026-06-09.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the NFS server where stale compound metadata could be exposed to userspace through the status interface. The issue occurs when an error path is taken after setting the RPC status counter to an odd value, causing an out-of-bounds read from adjacent slab memory. To prevent this, the patch clears the operation count field (opcnt) in the nfsd4_release_compoundargs function when releasing compound arguments.
